hooks.command: if [ "$(pwd)" = "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" ]; then echo 'Skip: main repo'; exit 0; fi && (bun install --frozen-lockfile || true) && ln -sf "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.env.local" .env.local && echo 'Worktree setup complete: bun install + .env.local symlink'
git worktree prune && echo 'Worktree cleanup: pruned stale worktrees'
